name: humanize-plugin
description: Humanize workflow authoring and runtime tools for local MCP clients.

interface.shortDescription: Author, check, review, and run Humanize flows.
interface.longDescription: Turn terse natural-language workflow requests into checked, locked, reviewed, and runnable Humanize flow packages.
defaultPrompt: Use Humanize to audit this repository.
Use workflow to prepare and run a reviewed flow.
Use Humanize to package this task with a README.
